nodes.label: Release Writeup Rule
nodes.rationale: When asked for release notes: gather git log/diff since the previous tag, cross-reference the GitHub auto-generated changelog, then combine both into a human-friendly writeup. Written for end users (not developers): avoid internal refactor jargon unless user-visible, address the reader as 'you', keep entries to 2-4 sentences, and follow the release-template.md format with categories ordered per .github/release.yml.

nodes.label: Old Configuration Documentation (Deprecated V1)
nodes.rationale: Documents the deprecated flat/env-var config format (ImmichServerUrl=..., Account2.ImmichServerUrl=...) that predates the nested YAML Settings.yml/json format; retained for users still on the old scheme, superseded by configuration.md.

nodes.label: Configuration File Discovery Order
nodes.rationale: ImmichFrame resolves its config dir via IMMICHFRAME_CONFIG_PATH env var, else a Config dir next to the executable, else a Config dir relative to cwd; inside it loads the first of Settings.json/Settings.yml/Settings.yaml; if none exist it falls back to environment variables. Users are warned not to copy the full reference file wholesale so future default changes aren't masked by a stale override.
